annotation.comment: A `//@ <directive> <expr>` LemmaScript contract, injected into TS/JS line comments. The `@` must follow `//` directly; only recognized directives trigger highlighting, so typos and prose stay plain. The expression body is NOT delegated to source.ts: embedding the full TS grammar inside a line comment leaks multi-line state across annotations and bypasses these spec overlays inside nested groups. We tokenize the spec vocabulary directly instead.

result.comment: The \result keyword: the return value, usable in `ensures`.
result.name: variable.language.result.lemmascript

quantifier.comment: Spec quantifiers: forall(k, P), exists(k: nat, P).
quantifier.name: keyword.other.quantifier.lemmascript

spec-type.comment: Type names in `//@ type x nat` overrides and quantifier binders.
spec-type.name: support.type.lemmascript

implies.comment: Logical implication / bi-implication. Matched before the generic operator rule so `==>` is not split into `==` and `>`.
implies.name: keyword.operator.logical.lemmascript
